name: coODCreateArray
title: coODCreateArray
syntax: void coODCreateArray( dword index, dword dataType, dword accessSub0, dword access, dword elementCount, dword errCode[] );
description: Generates a new field object in the local object dictionary. If the object already exists, then it is replaced by the new object.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: Index of the object, value range 1..65.535
